text.zh: 局部线性嵌入 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: Locally Linear Embedding is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: 萨姆·罗维斯和劳伦斯·索尔提出局部线性嵌入，这是一种保持局部重建权重的非线性降维算法。LLE 不直接建模全局距离，而是保持每个点可由邻居局部重建。
text.en: Sam Roweis and Lawrence Saul introduced locally linear embedding as a nonlinear dimensionality-reduction algorithm that preserves local reconstruction weights. Instead of modeling global distances directly, LLE keeps each point locally reconstructable from its neighbors.
